title: rosa × dumetorum var. wiedermanniana
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. wiedermanniana, also known as Wiedemann's wild rose, is a variety of the Rosa dumetorum species, a type of wild rose native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. wiedermanniana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its flowers and leaves, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
